lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have another amulet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: I'm Jarr, the taskmaster for the Kharidian Desert Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Achievement Diary?

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In the Kharidian Desert it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will reward you.

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a question about my Achievement diary.

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: Well, there are four different Desert amulets, which match up with the four levels of difficulty. Each has the same rewards as the previous level and some additional benefits too... which tier of rewards would you like to

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: know more about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Easy rewards please!

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: If you complete all of the easy tasks in the Desert, you can charge a Pharaoh's sceptre with 10 charges, Simon Templeton will purchase artefacts in banknote form and Desert goat horns are dropped as notes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Medium rewards please!

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: In addition to the easy rewards, you can charge a Pharaoh's sceptre with 25 charges and the amulet will teleport you to Nardah once per day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Hard rewards please!

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: In addition to the easy and medium benefits, you can charge a Pharaoh's sceptre with 50 charges, you can adjust your Camulet to teleport you above the temple and the Nardah herbalist will create unfinished potions

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: for you, as well as cleaning noted herbs for the usual herb cleaning fee.

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: All your rides on a magic carpet are free and you'll receive extra Agility experience from the Pollnivneach rooftop course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Elite rewards please!

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards, you can charge a Pharaoh's sceptre with 100 charges, the amulet will protect you from desert heat at all times, a shortcut opens up in the Kalphite hive and the amulet will

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: teleport you to Nardah and the kalphite hive to the East of the Shantay Pass as much as you desire. You'll also get completely free passage through the Shantay passes here and at the Ruins of Unkah.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I claim the rewards?

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: Just complete the tasks in the Desert so they're ticked off, then come and speak to me for your rewards.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: See you later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Desert Achievement Diary!

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: This amulet is a symbol of your exploration of the Kharidian Desert. You can now charge a Pharaoh's sceptre with 10 charges, Simon Templeton will purchase artefacts in banknote form and Desert goat horns are

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: dropped as notes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: If you ever lose your amulet, come back to me to reclaim it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Desert achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: You need to complete all of the easy tasks too before I can reward you for the more difficult sets.

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: I've upgraded your Desert amulet for you. You can now charge a Pharaoh's sceptre with 25 charges and the amulet will teleport you to Nardah once per day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Desert achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: I've upgraded your Desert amulet for you. You can now charge a Pharaoh's sceptre with 50 charges, you can adjust your Camulet to teleport you above the temple and the Nardah herbalist will create unfinished

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: potions for you.

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: All rides on a magic carpet are now free and you'll receive extra Agility experience from the Pollnivneach rooftop course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Desert achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You've completed all of the tasks in the Kharidian Desert! Here's your reward!

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: I've upgraded your Desert amulet for you. You can now charge a Pharaoh's sceptre with 100 charges, the amulet will protect you from desert heat at all times, a shortcut has been opened in the Kalphite hive and the

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: amulet will teleport you to Nardah and the kalphite hive to the East of the Shantay Pass as much as you desire. I've also negotiated completely free passage through the Shantay passes here and at the Ruins of

lines.speaker: Jarr
lines.text: Unkah.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!
